title: kaempferia galanga var. latifolia
intro: Kaempferia galanga var. latifolia, also known as the lesser galangal, is a variant of the Kaempferia galanga plant, a type of rhizome in the ginger family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of compounds like gingerol and galangin. The health benefits of Kaempferia galanga var. latifolia include relief from nausea, digestive issues, and fever, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. In herbal preparations, the rhizome is typically dried and ground into a powder, which can be used in teas, infusions, or added to food to harness its medicinal properties.
